about.name: Universiti Teknologi MARA (UiTM)
about.programmes: 518 academic programmes from foundation to postgraduate level
about.vision: To establish UiTM as a Globally Renowned University of Science, Technology, Humanities and Entrepreneurship
about.mission: To lead the development of agile, professional bumiputeras through state-of-the-art curricula and impactful research
about.viceChancellor: Professor Datuk Ts. Dr. Shahrin bin Sahib @ Sahibuddin

history.event: Started as RIDA Training Centre in Petaling Jaya, inspired by Dato' Onn Ja'afar
Officially opened by Trade & Industry Minister Ismail Abdul Rahman
Renamed Maktab MARA (MARA College) under Majlis Amanah Rakyat
Renamed Institut Teknologi MARA (ITM) by Tun Abdul Razak
ITM Act enacted, rapid expansion began with Shah Alam 300-acre campus
Upgraded to full university status as Universiti Teknologi MARA (UiTM)

history.note: UiTM is a Bumiputera institution dedicated to empowering indigenous communities

campuses.network: 1 main campus, 12 state campuses (7 autonomous), satellite campuses, and 21 affiliated colleges

byState.Selangor: UiTM Shah Alam (Main), Puncak Alam, Puncak Perdana, Dengkil, Hospital Sungai Buloh
byState.Negeri Sembilan: UiTM Negeri Sembilan (Kuala Pilah, Seremban, Rembau)
byState.Melaka: UiTM Melaka (Alor Gajah, Bandaraya Melaka, Jasin)
byState.Terengganu: UiTM Terengganu (Dungun, Kuala Terengganu, Bukit Besi)

campuses.kktNote: Kedah, Kelantan, and Terengganu (KKT states) have weekends on Friday-Saturday instead of Saturday-Sunday

scienceTechnology: Faculty of Sports Science and Recreation
Faculty of Computer and Mathematical Sciences
socialScienceHumanities: Faculty of Communication and Media Studies
Faculty of Film, Theatre and Animation
Faculty of Administrative Science and Policy Studies
businessManagement: Faculty of Hotel and Tourism Management
academicCentres: Institute of Continuing Education and Professional Studies

levels.name: Bachelor's Degree / Degree / Ijazah Sarjana Muda
levels.note: Degree and Ijazah both refer to Bachelor's Degree in UiTM

levels.name: Part-time & distance learning
levels.details: e-PJJ (e-Pembelajaran Jarak Jauh), PLK (Pembelajaran Luar Kampus)

channels: UPU (Unit Pengambilan Universiti) under Ministry of Higher Education
admission.entryQualifications: SPM, STPM, Matriculation, Asasi/Foundation, Diploma, equivalent certificates
admission.note: Each programme has specific entry requirements - check hea.uitm.edu.my for details

portals.mds: Minggu Destini Siswa (orientation week for new students)

contact.address: 40450 Shah Alam, Selangor Darul Ehsan, Malaysia
